PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $src = "c:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\VISUAL2\\diploma"; $out = "c:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\VISUAL2\\diploma\\_extracted"; foreach\($f in 'Образцы','Задание_на_ДП_06130100_ПО','Этикетка','Рецензия_на_дипломный_проект_ПО'\){ $dst = Join-Path $out $f; if\(Test-Path $dst\){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dst }; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\(\(Join-Path $src "$f.docx"\), $dst\); Write-Output "OK $f" })
